x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Maintenance windows prevent false-positive alerts from polluting the Now Assist TSOM event correlation corpus.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmn_schedule_maintenance");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" maintenance schedules defined",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" maintenance schedules. Unscheduled maintenance generates false-positive alerts that degrade Now Assist TSOM AI correlation accuracy.":n+" maintenance schedules -- false-positive alert pollution is controlled."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime. Associate with relevant CIs.
